title: Tech C.E.O.s to Discuss A.I. With G7 Leaders
summary_full: Executives from Anthropic, OpenAI and Mistral will be among those attending a lunch meeting with leaders from many of the world’s richest nations.
summary_public: Executives from Anthropic, OpenAI and Mistral will be among those attending a lunch meeting with leaders from many of the world’s richest nations.
